docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-16-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-06-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COURT ORDER SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR PLAINTIFF. (IFP); DEFENDANT TO BRING OWN INTERPRETER.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-07 BY COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK-F RAYRAY, NOTHING ON RECORD: PARTIES PRESENT IN COURT, PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED; DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2007 - JUDGMENT. PARTIES PRESENT, NOTHING ON RECORD, PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETURNED, DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK-BETH WILBER, NOTHIN ON RECORD. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODAS, GLADIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PLATERO, OMAR $350.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $350.00, IN ADDITION TO THE MONEY JUDGMENT, DEFT. SHALL MAKE AVAILABLE TO PLTF., AT A MUTUALLY CONVENIENT TIME, HER PERSONAL PROPERTY CURRENTLY IN DEFT'S POSSESSION. IF PLTF. DOES NOT CLAIM HER PROPERTY WITHIN 30 DAYS AFTER THIS JUDGMENT BECOMES FINAL, DEFENDANT MAY DISPOSE OF THE PROPERTY AS PROVIDED BY THE CIVIL CODE CONCERNING VACATED PREMISES. OTHER ORDERS/TERMS: PLAINTIFF ADDRESS TO BE CORRECTED TO 3235 26TH STREET, APT. 4, SF, CA 94110. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT "GRANTED".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RODAS, GLADIS AS TO DEFENDANT PLATERO, OMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING RETURNED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT PLATERO, OMAR
RECEIVED FROM DEFT IS ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PLATERO, OMAR
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER FILED BY DEFENDANT PLATERO, OMAR
